name: l2_powered_source_request_blocker_report
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestBlockerReport expands powered-source request readiness into stable request execution blockers.
note: Primary request blocker report.

name: l2_powered_source_request_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestReadinessGate supplies the request execution state for each scenario.
note: Readiness input.

name: l2_powered_source_api_surface_audit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceApiSurfaceAudit supplies the upstream powered-source API surface blocker consumed by request readiness.
note: Separates global API-surface readiness from per-request API backing.

name: l2_powered_source_request_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestPlan supplies the eight hover and cruise powered-source request envelopes.
note: Request-envelope input.

name: l2_powered_source_acceptance_handoff
value: Powered hover and cruise acceptance gates must open before request execution can be considered.
note: Acceptance readiness context.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered-source request building.
note: Upstream powered-source API target.

name: blocker_rule
value: Report request execution as blocked until the powered-source API surface audit is ready, hover and cruise acceptance gates are open, all eight request envelopes are present and valid, and every request is API-backed and buildable.
note: Method row for powered-source request blocker decomposition.
